title: blif .subckt uses wrong indices for input/output vector not starting from 0
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

In the verilog for the provided testbench ([blif_index.tar.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/3219345/blif_index.tar.gz)) file a subcircuit is instantiated with an input vector that is not starting from 0:
```verilog
module dut_sub(input clk, input [32:2] a, output [32:2] a_l);

always @(posedge clk) a_l <= a;

endmodule // dut_sub


module dut(input clk, input[32:2] a, output [32:2] a_l);

dut_sub sub(.clk(clk), .a(a), .a_l(a_l));

endmodule // dut
```

In the provided yosys script this code is just run through `synth` and `write_blif`

This bug report was triggered by ao68000 where top cell has ADR_O output with vector not starting from 0.

## Actual behavior

One gets the following `.subckt` in the output blif:
```blif
...
.subckt dut_sub a[0]=a[2] a[1]=a[3] a[2]=a[4] a[3]=a[5] a[4]=a[6] a[5]=a[7] a[6]=a[8] a[7]=a[9] a[8]=a[10] a[9]=a[11] a[10]=a[12] a[11]=a[13] a[12]=a[14] a[13]=a[15] a[14]=a[16] a[15]=a[17] a[16]=a[18] a[17]=a[19] a[18]=a[20] a[19]=a[21] a[20]=a[22] a[21]=a[23] a[22]=a[24] a[23]=a[25] a[24]=a[26] a[25]=a[27] a[26]=a[28] a[27]=a[29] a[28]=a[30] a[29]=a[31] a[30]=a[32] a_l[0]=a_l[2] a_l[1]=a_l[3] a_l[2]=a_l[4] a_l[3]=a_l[5] a_l[4]=a_l[6] a_l[5]=a_l[7] a_l[6]=a_l[8] a_l[7]=a_l[9] a_l[8]=a_l[10] a_l[9]=a_l[11] a_l[10]=a_l[12] a_l[11]=a_l[13] a_l[12]=a_l[14] a_l[13]=a_l[15] a_l[14]=a_l[16] a_l[15]=a_l[17] a_l[16]=a_l[18] a_l[17]=a_l[19] a_l[18]=a_l[20] a_l[19]=a_l[21] a_l[20]=a_l[22] a_l[21]=a_l[23] a_l[22]=a_l[24] a_l[23]=a_l[25] a_l[24]=a_l[26] a_l[25]=a_l[27] a_l[26]=a_l[28] a_l[27]=a_l[29] a_l[28]=a_l[30] a_l[29]=a_l[31] a_l[30]=a_l[32] clk=clk
...
```

## Expected behavior

Use of proper indices for `.subckt`:
```blif
...
.subckt dut_sub a[2]=a[2] a[3]=a[3] a[4]=a[4] a[5]=a[5] a[6]=a[6] a[7]=a[7] a[8]=a[8] a[9]=a[9] a[10]=a[10] a[11]=a[11] a[12]=a[12] a[13]=a[13] a[14]=a[14] a[15]=a[15] a[16]=a[16] a[17]=a[17] a[18]=a[18] a[19]=a[19] a[20]=a[20] a[21]=a[21] a[22]=a[22] a[23]=a[23] a[24]=a[24] a[25]=a[25] a[26]=a[26] a[27]=a[27] a[28]=a[28] a[29]=a[29] a[30]=a[30] a[31]=a[31] a[32]=a[32] a_l[0]=a_l[2] a_l[1]=a_l[3] a_l[2]=a_l[4] a_l[3]=a_l[5] a_l[4]=a_l[6] a_l[5]=a_l[7] a_l[6]=a_l[8] a_l[7]=a_l[9] a_l[8]=a_l[10] a_l[9]=a_l[11] a_l[10]=a_l[12] a_l[11]=a_l[13] a_l[12]=a_l[14] a_l[13]=a_l[15] a_l[14]=a_l[16] a_l[15]=a_l[17] a_l[16]=a_l[18] a_l[17]=a_l[19] a_l[18]=a_l[20] a_l[19]=a_l[21] a_l[20]=a_l[22] a_l[21]=a_l[23] a_l[22]=a_l[24] a_l[23]=a_l[25] a_l[24]=a_l[26] a_l[25]=a_l[27] a_l[26]=a_l[28] a_l[27]=a_l[29] a_l[28]=a_l[30] a_l[29]=a_l[31] a_l[30]=a_l[32] clk=clk
...
```
